mapper.insert:
INSERT into wvp_platform_gb_stream (gb_stream_id, platform_id, catalog_id) values
(#{item.gbStreamId}, #{item.platform_id}, #{item.catalogId})
mapper.delete: DELETE from wvp_platform_gb_stream WHERE gb_stream_id = (select gb_stream_id from wvp_gb_stream where app=#{app} AND stream=#{stream})

DELETE from wvp_platform_gb_stream where gb_stream_id in
#{item.gbStreamId}

DELETE from wvp_platform_gb_stream where platform_id=#{platformId} and gb_stream_id in
#{item.gbStreamId}
DELETE from wvp_platform_gb_stream WHERE platform_id=#{platformId} and catalog_id=#{catalogId}
mapper.select: SELECT pp.* FROM wvp_platform_gb_stream pgs LEFT JOIN wvp_platform pp ON pp.server_gb_id = pgs.platform_id LEFT join wvp_gb_stream gs ON gs.gb_stream_id = pgs.gb_stream_id WHERE gs.app =#{app} AND gs.stream =#{stream}

SELECT pp.* FROM wvp_platform pp left join wvp_platform_gb_stream pgs on pp.server_gb_id = pgs.platform_id left join wvp_gb_stream gs on gs.gb_stream_id = pgs.gb_stream_id WHERE gs.app = #{app} AND gs.stream = #{stream} AND pp.server_gb_id IN #{item}
